name: Retract: Mecha
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Temporary {Alert}. Obtain Keyflare equal to Erica's Keyflare Regen. Dispel self {Fragile} state. Whenever a card enters {Ultra Space}, transform into {Unleash: Mecha}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Temporary {Alert}. Obtain Keyflare equal to Erica's Keyflare Regen. Dispel self {Fragile} State. Place 1 of Erica's "Defense" with {Exhaust} into hand. Whenever a card enters {Ultra Space}, transform into {Unleash: Mecha}.
